copy.each_player_picks_a_column_the_disc_drop: Each player picks a column; the disc drops to the bottom.
copy.goal_connect_four_discs_in_a_row_horizon: Goal: connect four discs in a row — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal.
copy.blue_goes_first_after_each_move_the_turn: Blue goes first; after each move the turn passes to Gold and back.
copy.if_the_board_fills_with_no_four_in_a_row: If the board fills with no four-in-a-row — it's a draw.
